section.pSubtitle: Bullet recommendations — AI applies pharmacist format
section.sHint: AI will not edit this section
section.oHint: AI will not edit this section
section.pHint: AI applies bullets + drug format + Monitor

placeholder.s: e.g. Patient c/o dyspnea, denied chest pain.
placeholder.o:
e.g.
Dx: ARDS, CRE pneumonia
Allergy: NKDA
Labs: Cr 1.8 (0.6-1.2), K 5.8 (3.5-5.0)
Current meds: Meropenem 1g IV q8h
placeholder.a: e.g. CRE coverage inadequate given worsening infiltrate... (paste IDSA guideline)
placeholder.p:
e.g.
sug add ceftazidime-avibactam 2.5g IV q8h d/t MIC profile.
monitor: CRP, procalcitonin q48h, renal fx.
placeholder.refinementA: How to adjust? e.g. tone more neutral / translate to English
placeholder.refinementP: How to adjust? e.g. shorter / drop dose details / use bullets

insertToolbar.labWindowTitle: Adjust the time window for the next insertion

polish.writingInProgress: AI writing… you can edit when it finishes

compose.title: Final output (auto-joined S + O + A + P)
compose.description: If A / P were AI-polished, polished versions are used; S / O kept verbatim.
compose.staleBadge: {{section}} section edited — polished result may be stale

toast.noContentForPolish: This section is empty — please draft something first
toast.noContentForAandP: A and P are both empty — please draft something first
toast.polishFailed: AI polish failed, please retry later
toast.saveFailedCopiedOnly: Save failed, copied to clipboard (you can still paste into HIS)
toast.savedCopyFailed: Saved (but copy failed — please copy manually)
toast.saveAndCopyAllFailed: Save and copy both failed, please retry later

confirm.replaceBlock:
Section {{section}} already has a "{{label}}" block.
Click OK to replace with the latest version; Cancel to append a new one.
